title: Design, Supply and Fabrication of Disposal Caissons
content:
Client Name: FJORDS Processing
Specification: Design, Supply and Fabrication of Disposal Caissons (KIPIC – Al Zour refinery project)
Year: 2018
Size: 3200 Ø  mm X  30600 mm overall (Vertical)
